title: TFC better fireclay
description: Better fireclay recipes & more kaolin clay recipes
body:
Better fireclay recipes & more kaolin clay recipes

Fire Clay recipe changed: 4 fire clay ingredients + 1 clay ball → 1 fire clay ball

Fire clay ingredients include TFC graphite powder, TFC sapphire powder, TFC ruby powder, Immersive Engineering coal coke dust, Immersive Petroleum petroleum coke dust, and TFC+IE Crossover bauxite powder.

Kaolin clay can be used directly (right-click) to form ceramics, functioning the same as fire clay-formed ceramics.

更好的耐火粘土配方和更多高岭土配方

耐火粘土配方更改：4个耐火粘土原料+1粘土球→1耐火粘土球

耐火粘土原料包括群峦石墨粉，群峦蓝宝石粉，群峦红宝石粉，沉浸工程焦煤粉，沉浸原油石油焦粉，群峦沉浸联动铝土矿粉

高岭土可以直接右键捏制陶瓷，和耐火粘土捏制的陶瓷作用相同。
